---
title: "Datasets"
---

## Hurun Baidu Index Dataset (胡润百度指数)

> **本数据仅供学术研究使用，请勿用于商业用途。**
> This dataset is for academic research purposes only. Not for commercial use.

### Description

This dataset contains Baidu Search Index data for the keyword "Hurun" (胡润) across 31 provinces, autonomous regions, and municipalities in China, spanning from January 1, 2011 to December 31, 2025. The data was collected via web scraping using OpenCode.

### Data Files

| File | Description | Format |
|------|-------------|--------|
| `baidu_index_hurun_province_year.dta` | Provincial annual panel data (31 provinces × 15 years) | Stata (.dta) |

**Provincial daily CSV files** (31 files): Daily Baidu Index by province, named as `百度指数_胡润_[Province]_20110101_20251231.csv`

### Download

- [baidu_index_hurun_province_year.dta](data/hurun_baidu_index/baidu_index_hurun_province_year.dta)

**Provincial daily data:**

- [百度指数_胡润_上海市_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_上海市_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_云南省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_云南省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_内蒙古自治区_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_内蒙古自治区_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_北京市_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_北京市_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_台湾省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_台湾省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_吉林省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_吉林省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_四川省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_四川省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_天津市_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_天津市_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_宁夏回族自治区_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_宁夏回族自治区_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_安徽省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_安徽省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_山东省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_山东省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_山西省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_山西省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_广东省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_广东省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_广西壮族自治区_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_广西壮族自治区_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_江苏省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_江苏省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_江西省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_江西省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_河北省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_河北省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_河南省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_河南省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_浙江省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_浙江省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_海南省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_海南省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_湖北省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_湖北省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_湖南省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_湖南省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_澳门特别行政区_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_澳门特别行政区_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_甘肃省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_甘肃省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_福建省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_福建省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_西藏自治区_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_西藏自治区_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_贵州省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_贵州省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_辽宁省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_辽宁省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_重庆市_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_重庆市_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_陕西省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_陕西省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_青海省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_青海省_20110101_20251231.csv)
- [百度指数_胡润_黑龙江省_20110101_20251231.csv](data/hurun_baidu_index/百度指数_胡润_黑龙江省_20110101_20251231.csv)

### Citation

If you use this dataset in your research, please cite:

> Guan, Daiyu. (2026). Hurun Baidu Index Dataset (2011-2025). [Data set]. Available at: https://ngdewanyi.github.io/guandaiyu.github.io/data.html

---

## Michelin Restaurant Dataset (米其林餐厅)

> **本数据仅供学术研究使用，请勿用于商业用途。**
> This dataset is for academic research purposes only. Not for commercial use.

### Description

This dataset contains information on Michelin-starred restaurants in China, collected via web scraping using OpenCode.

### Data Files

| File | Description | Format |
|------|-------------|--------|
| `米其林2026截面数据.xlsx` | Comprehensive dataset of Michelin restaurants | Excel (.xlsx) |

### Download

- [米其林2026截面数据.xlsx](data/米其林2026截面数据.xlsx)

### Citation

If you use this dataset in your research, please cite:

> Guan, Daiyu. (2026). Michelin Restaurant Dataset. [Data set]. Available at: https://ngdewanyi.github.io/guandaiyu.github.io/data.html
